candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line near the top of the income statement; preferred over section headers and subtotal labels.
Revenue subtotal matching the same values as the main revenue line; useful fallback if label changes across years.
Section/header only, not the populated numeric revenue row.

variables.notes: Using a priority list of revenue labels; later code should take the first non-missing value.

candidates.why: Best direct cost-of-sales / cost-of-revenue line; preferred component over duplicated total rows.
Subtotal duplicate of cost of operating revenue, so less preferred.
Excludes depreciation and therefore is not the full reported COGS line.

variables.notes: Selected the primary direct cost line rather than duplicated totals.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Close SG&A concept from candidates, but it explicitly excludes R&D and therefore is not the best PROF mapping when a broader SG&A total exists.
Too broad; includes COGS and other operating items, so not suitable when explicit SG&A exists.
Only one component of SG&A, not the full overhead bucket.
R&D component, but not the overall SG&A bucket.

variables.notes: R:nc. The candidate list misses the best explicit SG&A row that is present in the preview: 'Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total'. Per rules, chose the semantically correct row outside the candidate list and flagged manual review. Using only the explicit SG&A row because it is populated and preferred over components/subtotals. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses - Total

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line above operating profit; ideal XRD mapping.
Supplemental duplicate of the dedicated R&D line; acceptable fallback only.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Expense - Expensed & Capitalized - Total - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental R&D total; less preferred than the primary income statement line.

variables.notes: R&D is separately reported above EBIT. It is not added separately to XSGA_COMPONENTS because the chosen SG&A total already includes it.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best direct recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader net financing totals.
Also a valid recurring interest line, but appears to duplicate the net-of-capitalized-interest figure here.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Lease-interest component likely already included in total interest expense, so selecting it in addition would risk double counting.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest

variables.notes: Avoided selecting both total interest expense and lease-interest component to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and excludes minority interest, which matches BE requirement.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only equity line; strong fallback if label changes.
Also appears to equal parent common equity here; acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Includes minority interest, so not preferred for BE when a parent-only line exists.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list uses parent-attributable equity lines to exclude minority interest from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; preferred mapping for MIB.
Equivalent-looking fallback label for minority interest.
Income statement flow item, not the balance sheet stock measure needed for MIB.

variables.notes: Using balance-sheet minority interest labels as a priority list.
